result:
**Goal for Round 79: Add an interactive help overlay (`H` key) — a categorized, scrollable keybinding reference panel.**

With 45 overlays and 100+ keybindings, the project's biggest UX gap is discoverability. The only way to learn controls is to read the 160-line comment header in the source code. An in-app help screen, organized by category (Core, Drawing, Analysis Overlays by domain), scrollable with arrow keys, and styled to match the existing panel aesthetic, would dramatically improve onboarding and daily use. This is pure exploitation — polishing the existing feature set rather than adding a 46th overlay.
